entries.title: IOS 268: DATE AND TIME UPDATE FAULT
entries.description: This IOS is activated when date and time update fault is present. F_TCN_IOS268; F_TCN_DateTimeRead; F_TCN_DateTimeWrite Date and time is manage automatically - by master VOBC or manually - from the maintenance screen of DDU. The date and time is broadcasted to MPU and from MPU to all equipment: APS,
entries.reason: 1. Date and time read fault is activated or Date and time write fault is activated F_TCN_DateTimeRead OR F_TCN_DateTimeWrite

entries.title: IOS 269: DATAPLUG FAULT RECORDING
entries.description: This IOS is activated when a failure occurs during transfer of data to be recorded in MPU dataplug. 1. MPU Data Plug recording fault is present F_TCN_IOS269 Data Plug recording fault
entries.reason: 1. MPU Data Plug recording fault is present F_TCN_IOS269 Data Plug recording fault Issue with the MPU Data Plug.Replace the data plug for a new one Refer to: AAGC-N0001-RSK-MTV-SYW-MAN-000021 - TCMS (Level 3).
remedy: Issue with the MPU Data Plug.Replace the data plug for a new one

entries.reason: 1. Communication with BRIO 3 is lost in DM car with occupied cabin in taking account to train configuration. ((VB_DRV_CabInService_1 AND F_TCN_BRIO3ComNOk_V1)
remedy: 72Q03 circuit breaker opened of BRIO 3 - 72A11, located in GCR - DM1 / DM2.
locations: GCR - DM1 / DM2
